javadoc_before:
/** * Add a value to the specified field. * This could be used to set a field using a different Chronology. * For example: * 
     * MutableDateTime dt = new MutableDateTime();
     * dt.add(GJChronology.getInstance().year(), 2);
     *
* * @param field the DateTimeField to use * @param value the value * @throws NullPointerException if the field is null */
javadoc_after:
/** * Add a value to the specified field. * This could be used to set a field using a different Chronology. * For example: * 
     * MutableDateTime dt = new MutableDateTime();
     * dt.add(GJChronology.getInstance().year(), 2);
     *
* * @param field the DateTimeField to use * @param value the value * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the field is null * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the value is invalid */
